title: Make get_simulation not depend on ArgParseSettings

body:
This PR changes the condition for calling `paperplots_held_suarez` so that we exercise this code in CI, rather than just the long runs.

In doing so, I've also fixed the arguments passed in so that it works
title: Always call paper plots to exercise code

body:
This PR renames the `post_processing` folder to `regression_tests`, since it's more accurate of what's being done in there.

I think, to keep this working, we'll either need to either

 - increment the reference counter (or reset to 1), and let this be the new folder we push things into (leaning towards this)
 - "look for" the `ref_counter.jl` / `mse_tables.jl` files when doing comparisons (which seems a bit more confusing)

We could change the history of the older reference datasets on the cluster, but I'm not sure that's ideal-- we should probably clean that out soon since it's accumulating fast. #611 will help with this, though.

I'm going to wait to merge this until we figure out what's going on with the long runs.
title: Rename post processing folder to `regression_tests`

body:
## Purpose and Content
The Wfact changes in #585 broke the long builds, due to the fact that threads would try to use the same work array. This adds extra work arrays for each thread.
